name: Structure Scan Silo Inspection
description: You are an Agricultural Technician performing a 3D photogrammetric inspection of a damaged grain silo for an insurance claim. Read the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_brief.txt for structural dimensions and scan parameters. Create a mission plan in QGroundControl using a Structure Scan pattern with a structure height of 28 meters, at least 3 scan layers, and a gimbal pitch of 0 degrees. The mission must begin with a Takeoff command and conclude with an RTL command. Save the final mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/silo_inspection.plan
